title: `ErrOverflow` should be allowed in `DELETE` and `UPDATE` statement if the `sql_mode` is not strict
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (id String, value Int32);
SELECT * FROM t WHERE CAST(id AS Int64) = 1;
DELETE FROM t WHERE CAST(id AS Int64) = 1;
UPDATE t SET value = NULL WHERE CAST(id AS Int64) = 1;
